# Vibecode generated index

This directory contains Vibecode architecture-map indexes.

## Committed files

- `README.md` documents index policy.
- `schema.json` documents generated artifact shapes and naming.

## Generated and ignored files

- `*.generated.*`
- `*.cache.*`
- `*.tmp.*`
- legacy generated outputs such as `file_inventory.json`, `symbol_map.json`, `test_map.json`, `dependency_map.json`, `entrypoints.md`, and `risky_files.md`

Generated indexes are not project truth. Regenerate them from source code and human-maintained `.vibecode/architecture/` and `.vibecode/checks/` files.
